div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.
This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.

title.value: WHO FHIR Implementation Guide (IG): Integrated Management of Childhood Illness (IMCI) in emergencies

description.value:
This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.
This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.

valueMarkdown.value: This IG uses CQL profiles and capabilities provided by the Using CQL With FHIR IG
This IG uses content management profiles and capabilities provided by the Canonical Resource Management Infrastructure (CRMI) IG
This IG uses questionnaire profiles and capabilities provided by the Structure Data Capture (SDC) IG
